hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=community-website
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The exercise change is missing."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" index.html styles.css | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n"  | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf community-website mkdir -p community-website git -C community-website init -q -b main git -C community-website config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner" git -C community-website config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local" cd community-website printf %s '

Community Hub

Home
' > index.html cd .. cd community-website printf %s 'body { color: navy; } ' > styles.css cd .. git -C community-website add -A git -C community-website commit -q -m 'Add project baseline' cd community-website printf %s '

Community Hub

Home Events
' > index.html cd .. cd community-website printf %s 'body { color: teal; } ' > styles.css cd ..

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=community-website
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 2 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The exercise change is missing."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" index.html styles.css | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n"  | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --format=%s)" = 'Add events navigation' ] || fail "The latest commit message is not correct."

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=community-website
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" index.html styles.css | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --format=%s)" = 'Refresh site palette' ] || fail "The latest commit message is not correct."
